samples.en: The salted fish is frizzling up in the sun.

samples.sentence: 這裡/裏有各種各樣的水果。
samples.pinyin: zhè li yǒu gè zhǒng gè yàng de shuǐguǒ.
samples.en: There are all kinds of fruits here.
samples.vi: Ở đây có nhiều loại trái cây.

samples.sentence: 他穿著各種各樣的衣服。
samples.pinyin: tā chuānzhuó gè zhǒng gè yàng de yīfu.
samples.en: He wears clothes of all kinds.
samples.vi: Anh ấy mặc nhiều loại trang phục.

items.vi: chế độ thống trị thuộc địa

samples.sentence: 這個皇朝統治了數百年。
samples.pinyin: zhège huángcháo tǒngzhìle shù bǎi nián.
samples.en: This dynasty ruled for hundreds of years.

samples.sentence: 統治階級製定了新的法律。
samples.pinyin: tǒngzhì jiējí zhìdìngle xīn de fǎlǜ.
samples.en: The ruling class enacted new laws.
Miso soup with seaweed.

samples.pinyin: zǎocān hē wèi zēng tāng zuì hǎo.
samples.en: It's best to drink miso soup for breakfast.
This radish is especially fresh.
samples.vi: Củ cải này rất tươi.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan chī bái luóbo tāng.
samples.en: I like to eat white radish soup.
samples.vi: Tôi thích ăn canh củ cải trắng.

samples.meaning: further; go a step further; advance a step
samples.sentence: 我國進一步實現農業機械化。
samples.en: Our country has further advanced agricultural mechanization.

samples.meaning: further; go a step further; advance a step
samples.sentence: 我們團隊進一步實現夢想了。
samples.en: Our team has taken another step towards realizing our dream.
